name: KUCHI SAKUSEI NO JUTSU (MOUTH CREATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
This advanced ninjutsu allows the user to apply a permanent set of special mouths on his hands and chest. This technique is highly dangerous to both the user and the subject, and as such has been deemed a forbidden jutsu.

The user may perform this technique on himself or a single willing, paralyzed or unconscious creature. Performing this technique on another creature requires that the user remain in constant physical contact for 10 minutes. If the user becomes distracted while concentrating on this technique, he must make a Concentration check (DC 20) to maintain contact and continue performing the technique. However, if the user takes damage or is unable to touch the creature before completion of the technique, then it dispels immediately.

Upon completion of this technique, the creature or user will gain two active mouths on each hand and one on the chest that is directly connected to the heart.

These mouths can be used to knead chakra into materials. They are especially useful for Kibaku Nendo techniques, as the mouths are able to knead multiple exploding clay sculptures. When performing Kibaku Nendo while possessing the mouth components, the user can increase the time to a full-round action to form up to 6 tiny sculptures, 4 small sculptures, or 2 medium sculptures (however the user can still only create one flying sculpture). The damage per sculpture is reduced by 4 die. The mouth components can also knead the user's chakra into other soft materials, such as cloth, paper, mud, soft earth, water, snow, and others (at the GM's disc retion).

However, the hands cannot knead harder materials such as wood or metal, and certainly not fully formed weapons.

After completing the technique, the user's chakra pool is reduced to 1, his reserves to 0, and he suffers chakra depletion. The subject 's hit points are reduced to 1 and he falls unconscious; if he was already unconscious he remains that way for an additional 1d4 hours. If the user is the subject of this technique, then he suffers both effects.

Special: The chest mouth component is directly connected to the heart, and thus the user's life force. It is terribly impractical to utilize this mouth's abilities other than as part of a suicidal last resort technique, such as Kyukyohu Geijutsu. However, the chest mouth will attempt to eat any materials within its reach, so it must remain covered, stitched up, or closed by some means at all times.

Effect: Manifests mouth components on the creature's body

XP Cost: 5,000 XP.
